items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: New wallet offers way to tackle Bitcoin’s quantum risk without a fork
items.summary: The Postquant Labs project uses Arch Network to deliver post-quantum signature protection without a Bitcoin soft fork, sidestepping both Jameson Lopp's freeze proposal and Paul Sztorc's hard fork.

items.title: Crypto traders turn cautious as bitcoin loses steam below $80,000
items.summary: Bitcoin drops after repeated resistance at $80,000, taking ether with it, while derivatives and macro signals point to reduced risk appetite and subdued volatility.

items.title: A digital shekel is here: Israel approves its first regulated stablecoin
items.summary: BILS was developed in collaboration with the Solana network and crypto custodian heavyweights Fireblocks with auditing oversight provided by Big Four consultancy firm EY.

items.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
items.summary: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

items.title: AML crackdown eclipses securities enforcement as crypto’s top regulatory risk: Report
items.summary: US Anti-Money Laundering fines hit $900 million in the first half of 2025 as enforcement shifted from securities cases, while Basel rules and mandatory audits reshape crypto compliance, according to CertiK.

items.title: Can Bitcoin hit $250K this year? Traders say it may be time to ‘sell in May’
items.summary: Veteran trader Peter Brandt and other analysts question the $250,000 Bitcoin target, warning the current bear phase may not be over.

items.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
items.summary: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

items.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
items.summary: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto ATMs as fraud cases mount
items.summary: Canada's Liberal government calls machines a “primary method” for scams as data and law enforcement link them to rising losses

items.title: XRP falls to $1.38 after breaking below $1.40 on rising selling pressure
items.summary: High-volume move flips support into resistance, leaving price stuck at a key decision level.

items.title: Bitcoin rises to $77,000 ahead of Fed decision as Trump preps for lengthy Hormuz block
items.summary: Bitcoin is sitting almost still while the rest of the majors give back gains and oil pushes above $111 on reports of an extended U.S. naval blockade against Iran.

items.title: Institutional money is coming for bitcoin, but Adam Back says it moves slower than you think
items.summary: The legendary cryptographer discusses institutional money flows into bitcoin.

items.title: Polymarket denies data breach, says hacker is selling public data
items.summary: The apparent hacker claimed to have breached other prediction markets and planned to release the data in the next few days.

items.title: Aptos says its new privacy coin seeks to fix one of crypto’s biggest trade-offs
items.summary: Aptos said its new privacy coin could be used to enable businesses to transact onchain without competitors tracking treasury moves and trading strategies.

items.title: CFTC pulls Wisconsin into fight over prediction market jurisdiction
items.summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Wisconsin in the agency’s fifth lawsuit against a US state to assert jurisdiction over prediction markets.

items.title: Robinhood dips as Q1 earnings miss and crypto revenue, volume fall nearly 50%
items.summary: Robinhood’s Q1 earnings per share and revenue figures missed industry expectations, sending the company’s shares down nearly 10%.

items.title: Bitcoin’s recent rally is largely fueled by Strategy purchases: Bitwise's Hougan
items.summary: While Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and whale buying have contributed to the recent Bitcoin rally, the key driver has been consistent buying by Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, according to Bitwise's chief investment officer.

items.title: Judge rejects new trial for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried
items.summary: A federal judge slammed Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for a new trial as seemingly “a plan to rescue his reputation,” denying the former FTX boss’s request.
